data.title: Iran's ayatollah releases defiant statement on nuclear program, Strait of Hormuz | CBC News
data.description: Iran's new Supreme Leader ‌Mojtaba Khamenei said in a published written message on ​Thursday that a new ​chapter for the Gulf and Strait ​of Hormuz has been taking shape ‌since the Iran war with the United States and Israel broke out on February 28.
